expectations.text: Output contains a Summary section with gap, bundle type, top actions, and metrics
expectations.evidence: Structure with bundle structure, PDP copy, tracking; metrics in section 3.

expectations.text: Bundle definition includes primer, concealer, powder, and brush (or brushes) as the Full Base Kit
expectations.evidence: 1 primer + 1 concealer + 1 powder + 1 brush set (or 1–2 key brushes).

expectations.text: Copy guidance includes a discount line such as 'Save 10%' or '10% off when you complete the look'
expectations.evidence: "One set, 10% off"; "Save 10% when you buy the set"; CTA "Add Full Base Kit to Cart — Save 10%".

expectations.text: Output specifies placement and one-click add-set UX on PDP
expectations.evidence: Headline, subhead, CTA, 'What's in the kit' section; bundle as single fixed SKU.

expectations.text: Output includes AOV, bundle attach rate, conversion, and margin or margin check
expectations.evidence: Bundle AOV, conversion rate, attach rate; margin note: 'After 10% discount, margin still acceptable'.
